title: mulgedium orbelicum
intro: Mulgedium orbelicum, also known as Balkan Bugloss, is a perennial plant species native to the Balkan Peninsula, characterized by its blue or purple flowers and hairy leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mulgedium orbelicum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Mulgedium orbelicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in the Balkan region for its therapeutic properties.
